name: Game Discovery Agent
description: Discover trending games, hidden gems, new releases, and personalized recommendations tuned to your taste.
tagline: Your personal scout for the next game worth your time.
capabilities: Surfaces trending titles across PC, console, and mobile
Finds hidden indie gems matched to genres you already love
Recommends games similar to any title you name
Tracks upcoming releases and adds them to a watchlist
Filters by genre, mood, playtime, and price

features.title: Trending Games
features.text: See what the world is playing right now, refreshed continuously.

features.title: Hidden Gems
features.text: Under-the-radar indies scored by quality, not marketing budget.

features.title: Similar Games
features.text: Name one game you love and get a ranked shortlist of relatives.

features.title: Upcoming Releases
features.text: A personalized release radar with reminders.

features.title: Genre Search
features.text: Drill into any genre, sub-genre, or mood in seconds.

prompts: Find the best RPG games released this month.
Recommend games similar to Elden Ring.
Show hidden indie games under $20.
What co-op games can I finish in a weekend?
List upcoming releases for the next 30 days on PC.

examples.prompt: Recommend games similar to Elden Ring.
examples.output: Top matches: Lies of P (soulslike, strong combat), Lords of the Fallen (open-zone soulslike), Nioh 2 (faster, build-heavy), and Dragon's Dogma 2 (open-world, stamina-driven). Lies of P is the closest on pacing and difficulty curve.

Picks: Pizza Tower ($19.99, frantic platformer, 96% positive), Dredge ($19.99, eerie fishing roguelite), and Cassette Beasts ($19.99, monster-tamer). All score above 90% with under 10k reviews — genuinely under-the-radar.

useCases: Beat decision paralysis when your library is huge but nothing fits.
Find your next game the night a title you loved wraps up.
Build a wishlist of upcoming releases worth pre-ordering.

faq.a: PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, and major mobile storefronts.
By matching genre, mechanics, mood, and player sentiment signals against your stated taste.
No. You can describe what you like in plain language and get useful results immediately.

name: Play-to-Earn Agent
description: Discover blockchain games that reward players, with ROI estimates, token economics, and a clear risk score.
tagline: Cut through the hype with hard numbers on play-to-earn.
capabilities: Estimates realistic ROI for a new player at today's prices
Breaks down reward structures and daily earning potential
Analyzes token economy health and emission schedules
Checks NFT requirements and secondary-market liquidity
Assigns a transparent risk score with the reasoning shown

features.title: ROI Estimate
features.text: Time-to-break-even modeled from entry cost and reward rates.

features.title: Reward Analysis
features.text: What you actually earn per hour, after sinks and fees.

features.title: Token Economy
features.text: Emission, burn, and supply pressure at a glance.

features.title: NFT Support
features.text: Entry-asset costs and floor-price trends.

features.title: Risk Score
features.text: A 0–100 risk rating with the factors that drove it.

prompts: Compare the best P2E games this quarter.
Which blockchain game has the highest daily rewards?
Estimate ROI for a new player with a $200 budget.
What's the risk score for the top three P2E titles?
Explain the token economy of a P2E game I name.

examples.prompt: Estimate ROI for a new player with a $200 budget.
examples.output: At current prices a $200 starter set yields ~$3.10/day at average play. Break-even ≈ 64 days, assuming token price holds. Risk score: 72/100 (High) — earnings depend heavily on new-player inflows.

examples.prompt: Which blockchain game has the highest daily rewards?
examples.output: Highest gross daily rewards currently trend to a card-battler at ~$5.40/day, but its risk score is 81/100 due to aggressive token emissions. A racing title pays ~$2.90/day at a far healthier 48/100 risk.

useCases: Vet a P2E game before spending on entry NFTs.
Compare earning potential across several games objectively.
Understand whether a token economy is sustainable or inflationary.

faq.a: No. Estimates are illustrative and markets are volatile — always do your own research.

faq.q: How is the risk score calculated?
faq.a: From token emission pressure, reward dependence on new players, liquidity, and entry cost.
Ethereum, Polygon, Ronin, Immutable, and Solana ecosystems.

name: Mobile Game Ranking Agent
description: Browse top mobile games by free, paid, grossing, trending, and new — across the App Store and Google Play.
tagline: The mobile charts, decoded and cross-referenced.
capabilities: Tracks Top Free, Paid, and Grossing in real time
Spots fast-rising titles before they peak
Compares iOS and Android rankings side by side
Filters by country and category
Flags new releases gaining traction

features.title: Top Free
features.text: The most-downloaded free games right now.

features.title: Top Paid
features.text: Best-selling premium titles worth the upfront price.

features.title: Top Grossing
features.text: Where players actually spend, ranked by revenue.

features.title: Trending
features.text: Climbers gaining rank fastest this week.

features.title: New Releases
features.text: Fresh launches breaking into the charts.

prompts: Show the top free games on iOS today.
What's trending up fastest on Google Play this week?
List the top grossing mobile games in Southeast Asia.
Which new releases broke into the top 50 this week?
Compare a title's rank on iOS vs Android.

examples.prompt: What's trending up fastest on Google Play this week?
examples.output: Biggest climbers: a survival-craft title (#84 → #12), an idle RPG (#140 → #41), and a hyper-casual runner (#60 → #23). The survival-craft title's spike tracks a major content update three days ago.

examples.prompt: List the top grossing mobile games in Southeast Asia.
examples.output: SEA top grossing: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (#1 across ID/PH/VN), Honor of Kings (#2), Free Fire (#3). MOBAs and battle royale dominate regional revenue charts.

useCases: Track how a game performs across regions and stores.
Catch breakout hits early for coverage or investment.
Compare monetization strength via grossing vs download charts.

faq.a: Apple App Store and Google Play across 30+ countries.
Chart positions reflect the latest daily snapshot.
Yes — any supported country or a regional rollup like SEA.

name: SEA Gaming News Agent
description: Summarize gaming news across Southeast Asia — daily headlines, patch notes, events, and releases, distilled by AI.
tagline: Every SEA gaming headline that matters, summarized in seconds.
capabilities: Aggregates daily gaming news across SEA markets
Summarizes long patch notes into the changes that matter
Tracks regional events, launches, and tournaments
Surfaces release dates relevant to SEA players
Generates a concise AI digest you can skim in a minute

features.title: Daily News
features.text: A regional headline roundup, refreshed every morning.

features.title: Patch Notes
features.text: Long changelogs distilled to what actually changed.

features.title: Events
features.text: Regional events, launches, and tournaments in one feed.

features.title: Releases
features.text: Upcoming and just-launched titles for SEA.

features.title: AI Summary
features.text: A one-paragraph digest of the day's biggest stories.

prompts: Summarize today's gaming news in Southeast Asia.
What changed in the latest Mobile Legends patch?
List gaming events happening in the Philippines this month.
Give me a one-paragraph digest of this week's SEA esports.
What major games are releasing in SEA next month?

examples.prompt: Summarize today's gaming news in Southeast Asia.
examples.output: Top stories: a major publisher opened a Jakarta studio; Mobile Legends shipped a new hero with a balance pass; and a regional Valorant league announced a Manila finals. Quiet day for releases — most activity is esports and live-service updates.

examples.prompt: What changed in the latest Mobile Legends patch?
examples.output: Headline changes: one new hero added, two assassins nerfed (cooldowns up ~10%), and a jungle XP rebalance that slows early ganks. Net effect: a slower, more team-fight-oriented early game.

useCases: Stay current on SEA gaming without reading a dozen sites.
Catch patch impacts before your next ranked session.
Plan around regional events and tournament schedules.

faq.a: Indonesia, Philippines, Vietnam, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore.
Headlines refresh daily; patch and event coverage updates as news breaks.

faq.q: Can I get just a summary?
faq.a: Yes — ask for the AI digest and skip the full feed.

name: Free Games Agent
description: Find games currently free to claim — giveaways, expiration dates, platform filters, and estimated value.
tagline: Never miss a free game worth claiming.
capabilities: Lists games free to keep right now
Shows exactly when each giveaway expires
Filters by platform and storefront
Estimates the normal retail value you're saving
Flags limited-time claims before they end

features.title: Giveaways
features.text: Everything free to claim across major stores.

features.title: Expiration Dates
features.text: Countdown to each offer's deadline.

features.title: Platform Filters
features.text: Narrow to Epic, Steam, GOG, consoles, and more.

features.title: Estimated Value
features.text: How much each freebie would normally cost.

prompts: What games are free to claim right now?
Which free game giveaways expire this week?
Show free games on the Epic Games Store.
What's the total retail value of this week's freebies?
List free-to-keep PC games ending in the next 48 hours.

examples.prompt: What games are free to claim right now?
examples.output: Free to keep now: a story-driven adventure (Epic, normally $24.99, ends in 2 days), an indie roguelite (GOG, $14.99, ends in 5 days), and a co-op shooter weekend (Steam, free to play through Sunday).

examples.prompt: Which free game giveaways expire this week?
examples.output: Expiring soon: the Epic adventure (2 days), a strategy bundle on Humble (4 days), and a mobile premium title gone free (6 days). Combined retail value ≈ $63.

useCases: Grow your library for free without checking five stores daily.
Claim high-value giveaways before they expire.
Find a free weekend game to play with friends tonight.

faq.a: Epic Games Store, Steam, GOG, Prime Gaming, and console storefronts.

faq.q: Are these free to keep or free to play?
faq.a: Both — each listing labels whether you keep the game permanently.
From the game's standard regional retail price at time of the giveaway.

examples.prompt: What esports matches are on today?
examples.output: Today: Valorant — Team A vs Team B at 18:00 (group stage), Dota 2 — two upper-bracket matches from 14:00, and a CS2 regional final at 21:00. Three of the five have official English streams linked.

examples.prompt: List tournaments with prize pools over $1M this year.
examples.output: Over $1M this year: The International (Dota 2), Valorant Champions, the League of Legends World Championship, and a major CS2 tournament. The International remains the largest single prize pool.

useCases: Build a watch schedule around your favorite teams.
Follow a live bracket without refreshing five tabs.

examples.prompt: What redeem codes are active for Genshin Impact right now?
examples.output: Active now: GENSHINGIFT (60 Primogems + 10k Mora, evergreen) plus two limited livestream codes granting ~300 Primogems total. The two limited codes expire in 36 hours — redeem those first.

examples.prompt: Which gaming voucher codes expire in the next 3 days?
examples.output: Expiring within 3 days: two Mobile Legends event codes (skins + diamonds), one Honkai code (currency), and a platform store voucher worth ~$5. Four codes, all verified working today.

useCases: Grab free in-game rewards without scouring social media.
Verify a code works before wasting a redemption attempt.
Catch limited-time livestream codes before they expire.

faq.q: How do you know a code still works?
faq.a: Codes are validity-checked and stamped with a last-verified time.

faq.q: Why is this agent in Beta?
faq.a: Code coverage is expanding game by game; expect rapid additions.

name: Game Review Agent
description: AI-powered review summaries — concise pros and cons, community ratings, and sentiment analysis for any game.
tagline: Hundreds of reviews, summarized into a verdict you can trust.
capabilities: Summarizes critic and player reviews into one verdict
Lists the most-cited pros and cons
Aggregates community ratings across sources
Runs sentiment analysis on player discussion
Highlights how opinion shifted after major patches

features.title: Review Summary
features.text: The consensus take in a few sentences.

features.title: Pros
features.text: What players consistently praise.

features.title: Cons
features.text: Recurring complaints, ranked by frequency.

features.title: Community Rating
features.text: An aggregated score across review sources.

features.title: Sentiment Analysis
features.text: How positive the conversation actually is.

prompts: Summarize reviews for the latest big AAA release.
What are the top pros and cons of a game I name?
Is community sentiment positive for this game right now?
How did reviews change after the 1.5 patch?
Give me a verdict in three sentences for a title.

examples.prompt: What are the top pros and cons of a game I name?
examples.output: Pros: gorgeous world design, tight combat, and a memorable soundtrack. Cons: a rocky launch with performance issues and a thin late-game. Net: strongly recommended now that patches have landed; sentiment is 84% positive.

examples.prompt: How did reviews change after the 1.5 patch?
examples.output: Pre-1.5 sentiment sat at 61% positive, dragged down by bugs. Post-patch it climbed to 83% as performance and quest-blocking issues were fixed. The biggest swing came from PC players.

useCases: Decide whether to buy without reading 50 reviews.
See whether a rough launch has since been fixed.
Get a balanced pros/cons view before a sale ends.

faq.a: A blend of critic outlets and player reviews across major platforms.
No — sentiment analyzes the language of discussion, not only star ratings.
Yes — it can compare opinion before and after major updates.
